shipRecommendationReason: This is a narrow runtime-home isolation fix for local behavior changelog data. It does not create a standalone release reason, but I see no higher-level blocker to shipping it with the functional-labs train once Sebastian approves that train.
bugsFixedByCodexReview: Fixed default BehaviorChangelog stores so they are built from runtime defaultOttoDir() instead of import-time OTTO_DIR-backed store defaults.
Added a default-constructor regression proving BehaviorChangelog reads an applied proposal from runtime OTTO_HOME, not just reports the runtime dir metadata.

proofBoundary: This is a backend/local-data change, so the attached evidence is fixture data and observed changelog output rather than screenshots. No live Letta connection was claimed.
